LCC-HS11-L1-BR300-HSALG2-PCI-API-02 • HS Math: Algebra II • Graphical Solutions and Approximation

Close Enough Is Still a Solution

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What was Dr. Tanaka's podcast episode mainly about?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the teacher say the x-value at the crossing point is the solution to f(x) equals g(x)?
3QUESTION 3: Based on what the teacher explains, why does Dr. Tanaka estimate solutions instead of solving them exactly?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Say one thing the teacher says and one thing the girl says out loud.
